name: checks: list with 2 checks shows names and tags

app.name: testapp
app.checks_toml:
app = "testapp"
[checks.lint]
tags = ["release"]
severity = "error"
fast = true
pure = true
needs_network = false
depends_on = []

[checks.format]
tags = ["dev"]
severity = "warn"
fast = true
pure = true
needs_network = false
depends_on = []
